tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: git rm -r --force .erk/impl-context/ 2>/dev/null; rm -rf .erk/impl-context/ && git add -A .erk/impl-context/ 2>/dev/null || true

session.assistant: Now let me submit the PR:

no changes added to commit (use "git add" and/or "git commit -a")
[plnd/enrich-objective-list-cli-03-05-1107 0ca2975c7] Enrich `erk objective list` CLI to match TUI dashboard 2 files changed, 121 insertions(+), 16 deletions(-)

session.assistant: The signal warnings are non-critical (plan reference was cleaned up). The PR was submitted successfully.

tool_use.name: TodoWrite
tool_use.param: [{'content': 'Enhance `erk objective list` CLI with 9 enriched columns', 'status': 'comple...[truncated 329 chars]...d clean up', 'status': 'completed', 'activeForm': 'Signaling completion and cleaning up'}]

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete.
**Summary of changes:**
1. **`src/erk/cli/commands/objective/list_cmd.py`** - Enhanced from 4 minimal columns to 9 enriched columns matching the TUI dashboard: - `#` - issue number with clickable link - `slug` - extracted from objective-header metadata or title (max 25 chars) - `prog` - done/total nodes (e.g., "3/7") - `state` - sparkline showing each node's status (e.g., "✓✓✓▶○○") - `deps-state` - "ready" or blocking dependency status - `deps` - PR numbers of blocking deps (up to 3) - `next` - next actionable node ID - `updated` - relative time since last update - `created by` - GitHub author
Added helper functions `_compute_slug()` and `_compute_enriched_fields()` that replicate the same logic used by `RealPlanDataProvider._build_row_data()` in the TUI.
2. **`.claude/commands/erk/objective-list.md`** - Simplified to just run `erk objective list` instead of raw `gh issue list`, since the CLI now produces the rich table directly.
**CI**: All Python checks pass (lint, format, types, 5599+ unit tests). Only pre-existing Prettier issues in unrelated docs.
**PR**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8777
